title: centella laevis
intro: Centella laevis, also known as Indian pennywort or narrow-leaved centella, is a type of flowering plant in the family Hydrocotylaceae. This plant is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Centella laevis include improved cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations for brain and skin care. Centella laevis can be consumed as a supplement, used in teas, or applied topically in creams and serums, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
